sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2303" key="ai)qa/lwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰθᾰ´λ-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, in pl., <sense id="n2303.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">clouds of sooty smoke</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:41:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">41.4</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
